judge_reason: Description B claims the white square is on the right end, contradicting Description A which correctly places it to the right of the red circle and before a black line extending to the right side.
original_image_tags: A simple line drawing inside a rectangular frame. A horizontal line represents a baseline or ground. At the left end, a red circle is labeled "Red light". To its right, connected by a short horizontal line, is a small white square labeled "White light". A black horizontal line extends from the white square to the right side of the frame.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A simple boxed line drawing showing a horizontal black line with a red circular light on the left labeled “Red light” and a white square/rectangular light near the center-right labeled “White light,” with caption text below reading “Image 1: Recreation of drawing provided by USPER6 of object seen in night vision goggles.”*
